title: Good News
why_this_song: Good News by Shaboozey (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Sittin' here, sippin' on cold truth
Nobody knows what I'm goin' through
But the devil wouldn't walk in my shoes
Keep on bluffin', but I just can't win
Drown my sorrows, but they learned to swim
Now, what a hell of a year it's been
Head in bottle, but my heart in a cage

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "need" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "need" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "good" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "good" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Keep on bluffin', but I just can't win

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Drown my sorrows, but they learned to swim
Nobody knows what I'm goin' through
Sittin' here, sippin' on cold truth

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Good News" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Good News" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Good News" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Good News" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Good News" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Good News"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.
